requirements.full_sentence:
Banks may put in place a system of
checks and balances to ensure that coins are distributed to retail customers in small lots and not to bulk customers.
requirements.object: system of checks and balances to ensure that coins are distributed to retail customers in small lots and not to bulk customers

requirements.full_sentence:
The distribution of coins shall be
verified by RBI Regional Offices through inspection of currency chest / incognito visits to branches etc.
requirements.object: Regional Offices through inspection of currency chest / incognito visits to branches etc

requirements.full_sentence: No separate claim is required to be made.

3.2 Incentives for installation of machines
i) The banks intending to purchase various machines as also establish currency chests during the period from July 01st to June 30th of a year, may submit their Annual Plans containing the details of the machines and the cost, to our Issue Offices latest by April 15 of every year on an ongoing basis.
requirements.object: containing the details of the machines and the cost, to our Issue Offices latest by April 15 of every year on an ongoing bas

requirements.full_sentence: Our Issue offices, on receipt of the plans, may advise the maximum amount of reimbursement permissible to each bank for that year.
requirements.object: of reimbursement permissible to each bank for that year

requirements.full_sentence:
Withdrawn
ii) The claims for incentives for installation of Cash Recyclers and ATMs dispensing lower denomination notes should be submitted to the respective Issue Office of RBI on quarterly basis within 30 days from the close of the respective quarter through the Link Office of the bank concerned.
requirements.object: respective Issue Office of RBI on quarterly basis within 30 days from the close of the respective quarter through the Link Office

requirements.full_sentence: Such claims may however be submitted only after full payment is made to the vendors for the machines.
requirements.object: after full payment is made to the vendors for the machines
